acceptanceSignals: Migration up/down passes on clean PostgreSQL.
Schema invariants for money/enum/append-only are enforced.

lastCommit.message: feat: implement PostgreSQL Schema and Migration Foundation (attempt 3)

attempts.latestEventSummary: feature completed: PostgreSQL Schema and Migration Foundation in 0 attempts

reinforcementResults.name: Contract Lockstep Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Pass. The workspace changes for F002 are confined to migration foundation assets (`migrations/*`, `scripts/check-sqlx-migrations.sh`, `scripts/setup-dev.sh`, workflow/docs/tooling), with no backend handler/OpenAPI/generated-client delta, so the active contract-sync policy is satisfied for this feature. The implementation uses `sqlx migrate` lifecycle commands, pins PostgreSQL 16, enforces UUID global PK (`global_pk`), BIGINT minor units (`money_minor`), enum types, and append-only guards for `audit_event`/`payroll_ledger_entry`, and adds an up/down verifier plus CI gate. I could not execute the Docker-backed verifier in this sandbox due denied Docker socket access, so runtime validation here is based on static review of the scripts/migrations/workflow.

reinforcementResults.name: Persistence Integrity Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: No blocking issues found for this feature in the current workspace. The implementation is migration-driven with `sqlx migrate` (`migrations/`, `package.json` scripts), targets PostgreSQL 16, enforces a single global UUID PK standard (`global_pk`), BIGINT minor-unit money (`money_minor`), enum-backed states, UTC `TIMESTAMPTZ` `_utc` columns, and append-only protections on event/ledger tables with trigger guards. Real-DB verification is implemented in `scripts/check-sqlx-migrations.sh` and wired into CI via `.github/workflows/postgresql-migration-foundation.yml`. Local execution of the verifier was blocked here by Docker sandbox permissions, so runtime proof is via the committed verification gate.

reinforcementResults.name: No-Legacy/Fallback Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Pass for this feature scope. The workspace includes a single `sqlx migrate` migration pair with audited relational schema, UUID-based global PK convention (`global_pk`), BIGINT minor-unit money domain (`money_minor`), enum-backed state types, UTC `TIMESTAMPTZ` columns, and append-only trigger guards for `audit_event`/`payroll_ledger_entry`. Migration lifecycle wiring is present via `sqlx migrate run/revert` scripts, startup migration execution, and a dedicated CI workflow invoking `scripts/check-sqlx-migrations.sh` for clean-DB up/down plus invariant assertions. I could not execute the Docker-based verifier in this sandbox due Docker socket restrictions, so runtime execution proof is inferred from the committed verifier + CI gate. Post-cutover in-memory persistence removal is a later-phase concern and not a blocker for this foundation feature.

executionConstraints: Use one global PK standard after `ISS-006` decision.
Use UTC timestamps + BIGINT minor units.
name: PostgreSQL Schema and Migration Foundation
rationale: Durable data correctness is prerequisite for every portal flow.
summary: Build audited relational schema and migration lifecycle.
